name: NORTH EUROPEAN OIL ROYALTY TRUST
business: The Trust holds overriding royalty rights covering gas and oil production in certain concessions or leases in Germany, receiving royalties from sales of gas, oil, and sulfur. The Trust does not conduct any active business activities or operations; its function is to collect, hold, invest, and distribute royalty payments.
sellsTo: No direct sales; receives royalty income from operating companies

exposures.sentence: The Trust holds overriding royalty rights covering gas and oil production in certain concessions or leases in the Federal Republic of Germany.
